message:
fix(linalg,random,ufunc): harden cond on empty arrays, validate MT19937 state restore, and fix isize overflow in view/pad/roll operations

Linalg: cond_nxn now returns ShapeContractViolation for n=0 instead of
indexing into empty singular value vectors. eigvalsh_nxn uses total_cmp
instead of partial_cmp for deterministic eigenvalue sorting.

Random: MT19937 from_state_entries now validates pos <= MT_N and state words
fit in u32 (via try_from), returning None (→ rng_state_schema_invalid) for
out-of-range values. Two new tests: rejects invalid position, rejects
oversized state word.

Ufunc: Replaces 6 bare `(dim - 1) as isize` casts with isize::try_from in
UFuncArrayView iteration (shared view coordinate reset, span calculation)
and pad wrap mode (rem_euclid index). Fixes roll() to compute shift modulus
without intermediate negative-as-unsigned conversion that could wrap on
large arrays. MaskedArray mean/var reshape now uses try_from for shape
dimensions. All changes prevent silent truncation on 32-bit or hypothetical
>2^63 dimension arrays.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
